name: Kindergarten Journalism & Media Studies — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for interviews, photo permission, fact versus pretend, and a class news share. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with interviews, photo permission, fact versus pretend, and a class news share.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

activities.title: A close look at interviews, photo permission, fact versus pretend, and a class news share
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at interviews, photo permission, fact versus pretend, and a class news share, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.
